title: Validate Binary Search Tree
description:
Given the `root` of a binary tree, determine if it is a valid binary search
tree: every node’s left subtree holds only smaller values, the right subtree
only larger, and both subtrees are themselves BSTs.

The tree input is in level-order array form.

solutions.summary: Carry an allowed (low, high) range down to each node.

steps.title: Recurse with bounds
steps.explanation: Each node must lie strictly inside its inherited `(lo, hi)`; recurse, tightening the bound for each child.
